ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the player's team is in */,
  "new_league" TEXT /* New league if the player has changed leagues */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the player */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  "throwing_hand" TEXT /* Throwing hand (e.g., right, left) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_division FOREIGN KEY ("division") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "league_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "league_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_president" TEXT /* Name of the league president */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the division */,
  "division_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "home_runs" INTEGER /* Number of home runs */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  "years" INTEGER /* Number of years played */,
  "career_at_bats" INTEGER /* Total career at-bats */,
  "career_hits" INTEGER /* Total career hits */,
  "career_home_runs" INTEGER /* Total career home runs */,
  "career_runs" INTEGER /* Total career runs scored */,
  "career_rbis" INTEGER /* Total career runs batted in */,
  "career_walks" INTEGER /* Total career walks */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., batting, pitching) */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "plate_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of plate appearances */,
  "on_base_percentage" REAL /* On-base percentage */,
  "slugging_percentage" REAL /* Slugging percentage */,
  "on_base_plus_slugging" REAL /* On-base plus slugging percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the salary belongs to */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary amount */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the salary is for */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "bonus" REAL /* Bonus amount */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus amount */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_salaries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_statistics" (
  "fielding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the fielding statistics belong to */,
  "put_outs" INTEGER /* Number of put-outs */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "errors" INTEGER /* Number of errors */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season year */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "double_plays" INTEGER /* Number of double plays turned */,
  "triple_plays" INTEGER /* Number of triple plays turned */,
  "fielding_percentage" REAL /* Fielding percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fielding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team manager, coach, scout, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the player data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
